name: What evidence do I need if Google AI Overview gave my Phoenix lawyer bogus case law?
description: AI logs, fake citations in filings, harm proof like dismissal.[2]

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need if Google AI Overview gave my Phoenix lawyer bogus case law?

acceptedAnswer.text: AI logs, fake citations in filings, harm proof like dismissal.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Collect the court filing with fake citations, AI chat logs/screenshots, original prompts, and proof of case harm like dismissal or adverse ruling. NY cases show courts sanction unverified AI hallucinations, strengthening negligence claims.[2] Factors: expert testimony on AI unreliability, damages quantification. Preserve metadata. Compare to verified research showing fakes. This builds causation proof; share with malpractice counsel early.
